title: Scrap Price Dip — Inventory Build
benefit: Indian containerised scrap softening on weak EAF demand and stronger rupee — favourable scrap-vs-pellet spread.
action: Opportunistically build scrap inventory and renegotiate supply at the dip.

title: India PLI Supplier Pipeline
benefit: Rs 2.1L Cr PLI-backed capital investment creates qualified Indian suppliers with competitive pricing and lower geopolitical risk.
action: Identify and qualify India PLI suppliers for capex and MRO categories.

title: Reverse Auctions — Commoditised Spend
benefit: CIPS benchmark: 11% savings in commoditised categories with 5+ qualified bidders.
action: Identify top 5 reverse-auction candidate categories (MRO, consumables, logistics lanes).

title: Category Management Maturity
benefit: Mature category programmes deliver 4.2% vs 1.8% savings — highest-ROI procurement improvement.
action: Assess maturity and stand up category strategies for top 10 spend categories.

title: Circular Sourcing Pilots
benefit: Circular procurement pilots achieve 12% reduction plus ESG/CBAM benefit — dual value.
action: Pilot circular sourcing in packaging and consumables; map recycled content.

title: GenAI in Spend Classification
benefit: GenAI early adopters report 40% RFQ-to-award reduction via autonomous classification and supplier matching.
action: Launch a GenAI PoC in spend classification; benchmark current cycle times.

title: Renewable / Captive Power PPA
benefit: Power is a top-3 conversion cost; PPAs and captive renewables hedge tariff inflation and cut CBAM-relevant emissions.
action: Evaluate renewable PPA and captive options for energy-intensive processes.

title: Aluminium Forward Contract Window
benefit: Aluminium -8% on easing energy costs and Gulf oversupply; 3-6 month window before EV/construction recovery.
action: Lock 6-12 month aluminium forward agreements for exposed categories.
